name: Spargelgemuse (Fresh Asparagus)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash asparagus spears and trim off tough ends.
2. Place asparagus in boiling salted water and cook until tender, 7 to 10 minutes.
3. Drain off liquid.
4. In a small saucepan, melt the butter over low heat until lightly browned.
5. Sprinkle freshly grated cheese over butter and mix well.
6. Spoon the cheese mixture over the asparagus.
7. Garnish with sliced hard boiled egg.
